context: Tests whether HealthKit setup guidance handles current platform availability and read/write authorization privacy correctly.

checklist.name: iPad availability
checklist.description: States that HealthKit data is available on iPadOS 17 or later and should not be described as categorically unsupported on iPad.

checklist.name: Availability guard
checklist.description: Requires calling HKHealthStore.isHealthDataAvailable() before using other HealthKit APIs and handling unavailable or restricted stores.

checklist.name: Capability and purpose strings
checklist.description: Mentions the HealthKit capability and the relevant NSHealthShareUsageDescription and/or NSHealthUpdateUsageDescription purpose strings.

checklist.name: Write authorization boundary
checklist.description: Explains that authorizationStatus(for:) reports write/share authorization and does not reveal whether read access was granted or denied.

checklist.name: Read denial semantics
checklist.description: Explains that denied read access can return samples the app saved, so empty or partial results are not a reliable denial signal.
